NAVAREA XIX 46/25
 1. M/V RAMFORM TETHYS IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 05 MAY 2025  TOWING 12 SEISMIC CABLES LENGTH 3NM AND 1NM WIDTH
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 A. 71-12.50N 021-30.00E
 B. 71-12.50N 020-33.30E
 C. 71-52.40N 020-32.20E
 D. 71-52.40N 021-31.00E

 2. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 3NM AHEAD AND ON BOTH SIDES, 5NM ASTERN.
 SUPPORT VESSELS THOR FREYJA AND MARIANNE G IN ATTENDANCE.
 VHF WORKING CHANNELS 88 AND 16.
  
 3.END OF SEISMIC SURVEY: UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE.
